name: Student Demographics & Success Factors
description: Tác động của nhân khẩu học (IMD, region, education, age, disability) lên kết quả học tập.

cards.text: 👥 Demographics & Success Factors — Phân tích bất bình đẳng học tập
Dashboard này trả lời câu hỏi: **đặc điểm nhân khẩu nào ảnh hưởng tới khả năng pass?** Nguồn: `Fact_Performance` join với `Dim_Student`.

cards.name: Overall Pass Rate %
cards.query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN final_result IN ('Pass','Distinction') THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS pass_rate FROM Fact_Performance

cards.name: Distinction Rate %
cards.query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN final_result='Distinction' THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS distinction_rate FROM Fact_Performance

cards.name: Withdrawn Rate %
cards.query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN final_result='Withdrawn' THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS withdrawn_rate FROM Fact_Performance

cards.name: Student Journey Funnel
cards.query:
SELECT 'Registered' AS step, 1 AS sort_order, COUNT(*) AS students FROM Dim_Student
UNION ALL SELECT 'Submitted >= 1', 2, COUNT(DISTINCT student_key) FROM Fact_Performance WHERE score IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Passed', 3, COUNT(DISTINCT student_key) FROM Fact_Performance WHERE final_result IN ('Pass','Distinction')
UNION ALL SELECT 'Distinction', 4, COUNT(DISTINCT student_key) FROM Fact_Performance WHERE final_result = 'Distinction'
ORDER BY sort_order

cards.text:
### 🔴 Insight #1 — IMD Inequality
Pass rate đi từ **66.2%** (vùng nghèo nhất 0-10%) → **76.6%** (vùng giàu hơn 40-50%). Khoảng cách **~10pt** chỉ do socio-economic.

cards.name: Pass Rate by IMD Band (Poverty)
cards.query:
SELECT ds.imd_band AS `IMD Band`,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN fp.final_result IN ('Pass','Distinction') THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS pass_rate_pct
FROM Fact_Performance fp JOIN Dim_Student ds ON fp.student_key = ds.student_key
WHERE ds.imd_band IS NOT NULL AND ds.imd_band <> ''
GROUP BY ds.imd_band ORDER BY ds.imd_band

cards.name: Region Performance Ranking
cards.query:
SELECT ds.region AS Region,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN fp.final_result IN ('Pass','Distinction') THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS pass_rate_pct
FROM Fact_Performance fp JOIN Dim_Student ds ON fp.student_key = ds.student_key
GROUP BY ds.region ORDER BY pass_rate_pct DESC

cards.name: Disability Impact on Outcome
cards.query:
SELECT ds.disability AS `Khuyết tật`, fp.final_result AS `Kết quả`, COUNT(*) AS n
FROM Fact_Performance fp JOIN Dim_Student ds ON fp.student_key = ds.student_key
GROUP BY ds.disability, fp.final_result
ORDER BY ds.disability, fp.final_result

cards.text:
### 🟡 Insight #2 — Education + Age + Prior Attempts
- **Trình độ học vấn càng cao → pass rate càng cao** (~20pt khác biệt).
- **Age band 35-55**: pass rate cao hơn 0-35 vài điểm (sinh viên trưởng thành ổn định hơn).
- **Prior attempts ↑ → pass rate ↓**: số lần thi trước càng nhiều, càng khó pass.

cards.name: Education x Age Band Pass Rate
cards.query:
SELECT ds.age_band AS `Age band`, ds.highest_education AS `Trình độ`,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN fp.final_result IN ('Pass','Distinction') THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS pass_rate_pct
FROM Fact_Performance fp JOIN Dim_Student ds ON fp.student_key = ds.student_key
GROUP BY ds.age_band, ds.highest_education
ORDER BY ds.age_band, ds.highest_education

cards.name: Prior Attempts vs Pass Rate
cards.query:
SELECT ds.num_of_prev_attempts AS `Prior attempts`,
       COUNT(DISTINCT fp.student_key) AS num_students,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN fp.final_result IN ('Pass','Distinction') THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS pass_rate_pct
FROM Fact_Performance fp JOIN Dim_Student ds ON fp.student_key = ds.student_key
GROUP BY ds.num_of_prev_attempts ORDER BY ds.num_of_prev_attempts

cards.name: Studied Credits Distribution by Result
cards.query:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN ds.studied_credits < 60 THEN '< 60'
    WHEN ds.studied_credits < 120 THEN '60 - 119'
    WHEN ds.studied_credits < 180 THEN '120 - 179'
    ELSE '>= 180'
  END AS `Tải tín chỉ`,
  fp.final_result AS `Kết quả`,
  COUNT(*) AS n
FROM Fact_Performance fp JOIN Dim_Student ds ON fp.student_key = ds.student_key
GROUP BY `Tải tín chỉ`, fp.final_result
ORDER BY `Tải tín chỉ`, fp.final_result

cards.text:
### 🟢 Recommended Actions

1. **Targeted tutoring cho IMD 0-30%** — nhóm có pass rate thấp nhất, ~5,000 sinh viên
2. **Pre-course program cho `No formal qual`** — tăng baseline education
3. **Dedicated mentoring cho disability=Y** — giảm withdrawn rate
4. **Cảnh báo sớm cho student có >= 2 prior attempts** — cohort rủi ro cao
